memory.query: phase 5 dashboard local llm chat shell

results.title: Phase 5 and 6 roadmap expanded for local chat and IDE bootstrap
results.content: Expanded planning docs so Phase 5 now includes a dashboard-native local LLM chat surface that can use the full MCP toolset for Q&A and CRUD. Expanded Phase 6 from branch topology only into a broader post-Phase-5 CLI/IDE automation track covering repo-local MCP/instruction/agent installation per repository, version-aware updates, secret-safe MCP config handling with .gitignore or indirection, cross-platform quick-install scripts for Minder server and CLI, and GitHub Release packaging/docs. Updated progress trackers, implementation phases, project progress, progress index, and task breakdown to keep the roadmap consistent.

results.title: LiveChat wizard shared-shell implementation
results.content: Implemented LiveChat channel UX alignment with the shared connect wizard. Added a dedicated liveChat theme preset in shared channelThemes, centralized LiveChat step/guidance/section metadata in LiveChatConnect/types.ts, updated LiveChatConnect to use shared step pills, icon, guidance panel, and shared theme, refactored create/install steps to use ChannelGuideSection, and added matching i18n keys in en/vi/id/ja/zh. Also tightened edit-mode gating so the wizard does not advance before live chat details load. Verified with npx tsc --noEmit and JSON parsing for touched locale files.

results.title: User inbox live chat integration
results.content: Integrated UserInboxesPage with live-chats/me list, authenticated widget messages, and live-chat websocket. Added externalCompanyId to omi-channel-be live chat me response so frontend can fetch thread messages and media uploads per company. Updated findtourgoUI provider/sidebar/panel to use real queries, selection, optimistic send, socket join, and attachment uploads via LIVE_CHAT default channel.

results.title: Live chats me controller clean-architecture refactor
results.content: Moved authenticated user live chats listing from LiveChatsController to presentation/live-chat-user.controller.ts with GET companies/:companyId/live-chats/me. Refactored GetMyLiveChatsUseCase and ILiveChatUserRepository to use application-layer response types plus tenant-aware input { companyId, externalIds[] } so repository filters by liveChat.companyId and auth user identifiers instead of presentation DTO coupling. Updated live-chats.module.ts to register LiveChatUserController.

results.title: Zalo guided setup wizard with optional video sidebar
results.content: Implemented a reusable 2-column channel wizard shell for connect flows: ChannelWizardLayout now supports optional step items, desktop guidance sidebar, and mobile collapsible guidance panel. Added shared ChannelGuidancePanel, ChannelGuideSection, and channelWizard.types. Refactored ZaloConnect to keep the existing 4-step flow while grouping inputs by instruction: step 1 collects channel name + OA ID under register/verify OA, step 2 groups app credentials and tokens, step 3 handles domain verification, step 4 handles webhook enablement. Added per-step guidance config and i18n keys in en/vi/ja/zh/id for guide panel copy and step navigation. Validation: targeted eslint clean; npx tsc --noEmit is blocked by unrelated existing .next validator missing page modules under live_chats/settings/channels.
